task_completion.description: Open and read the quest script text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'quest_script.txt' from the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Create nodes using the required visual schema shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io canvas shows a mix of the required shapes: Rectangles, Parallelograms/Hexagons, Diamonds/Rhombuses (at least 3 for logic checks), Rounded Rectangles, and Ellipses/Circles.

task_completion.description: Populate the flowchart with quest dialogue, choices, and the four specific endings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text inside the shapes corresponds to a cyberpunk quest, specifically including the four endings: 'Success', 'Scammed', 'Combat', and 'Arrested' (which should be in Ellipse/Circle shapes).

task_completion.description: Connect the nodes with labeled arrows showing flow conditions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Directional arrows connect the shapes on the draw.io canvas, and these arrows have text labels on them indicating the logic outcomes or flow conditions.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as a .drawio file on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io application window title shows 'quest_flow.drawio', or a save dialog is visible saving the file to the Desktop directory.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as a PNG file to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io 'Export as PNG' dialog is visible, or a file manager/terminal shows 'quest_flow.png' successfully created on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io Desktop GUI to create the flowchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the draw.io application interface being actively used (toolbars, shape panels, canvas), rather than terminal commands generating XML files directly.

integrity.description: The agent manually constructed the diagram rather than importing a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the progressive addition of shapes, text, and arrows over multiple steps, not a fully complete diagram appearing instantly.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export functionality to create the PNG.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draw.io 'File -> Export as' menu or export dialog is visible in the screenshots, rather than a command-line conversion tool being used on the .drawio file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The quest script is located at /home/ga/Desktop/quest_script.txt. The output files must be saved exactly as /home/ga/Desktop/quest_flow.drawio and /home/ga/Desktop/quest_flow.png. The completed diagram must contain a minimum of 12 nodes. It must strictly include 'rhombus' shapes (for logic checks) and 'ellipse' shapes (for endings).
